error: TimeoutError: Waiting for selector '#loading-spinner' to be hidden
diagnosis: Page has infinite loading state or spinner never disappears
fix: Check if the API call is failing. Add error handling: await Promise.race([page.waitForSelector('#loading-spinner', {state: 'hidden'}), page.waitForSelector('.error-message')])

diagnosis: Dropdown menu only appears after clicking trigger element
fix: Click the dropdown trigger first: await page.click('.dropdown-toggle'); await page.click('.dropdown-menu .option')

error: Error: strict mode violation: locator resolved to 3 elements
diagnosis: Multiple submit buttons on page, selector is ambiguous
fix: Make selector more specific using parent context: await page.click('form#login-form button.submit') or use nth: await page.click('button.submit >> nth=0')

diagnosis: Link opens new tab/window, original page context is lost
fix: Use popup handling: const [popup] = await Promise.all([page.waitForEvent('popup'), page.click('a.external-link')]); await popup.waitForLoadState()

error: Error: Element is outside of the viewport
diagnosis: Element exists but is not scrolled into view
fix: Scroll element into view first: await page.locator('#footer-link').scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(); await page.click('#footer-link')
